title: Pun-ishment
description:
Welcome to Pun-ishment, where two innocent pictures can lead to one very questionable answer.

Each level gives you a pair of images. Your job is to look at what they show, how they sound, what they might mean, and how they could possibly fit together.

There are no complicated controls and no long explanations. Just observe, connect the dots, type your guess, and wait for the moment when the puzzle suddenly makes sense in the worst possible way.

Some puzzles click instantly. Some send your brain in completely the wrong direction. And some only make sense after the answer appears, followed by a very quiet "...oh no."

Play it alone, pass it around with friends, or let everyone argue over the same two pictures until someone finally says the cursed answer.

We plan to add more puzzles and language support through free updates from time to time.

Key Features:

- Two pictures form one puzzle

- Guess answers through puns, wordplay, meanings, and lateral thinking

- Short levels that are easy to start and hard to stop

- A lighthearted puzzle experience for solo play or playing along with friends
description_short: Look at two pictures. Guess wrong ten times. Then suddenly realize the terrible joke was there all along. Pun-ishment is a playful picture puzzle game about puns, wordplay, and lateral thinking, built for quick laughs, shared guesses, and “just one more” moments.
